question: Summarize the main points of the employee handbook.

gold_span_refs.quote: Employees receive 15 days of annual leave after probation.
Regular employees may work remotely up to three days per week.
All employees must finish security training within 14 days of onboarding.

question: 請摘要理賠作業指引的重點。

gold_span_refs.quote: 申請人需先上傳事故證明與身分文件。
文件齊備後，標準案件於七個工作天內完成審核。
資料不完整且逾期未補件者，案件將結案不予受理。

question: Summarize the key points of Benefits Overview, including the Chinese onboarding note.

gold_span_refs.quote: Full-time employees receive 12 days of annual leave in the first year.
新進同仁需在到職後七天內完成資訊安全課程。
福利手冊只說明公司提供醫療與心理健康資源，沒有列出正式理賠審核天數。

question: Give me an overview of the travel policy.

gold_span_refs.quote: Domestic travel needs manager approval.
Meal receipts must be submitted within 30 days.
Emergency travel can start before approval, but retrospective approval is required within 2 business days.

question: Summarize the remote work section of the employee handbook.

gold_span_refs.quote: Regular employees may work remotely up to three days per week.
New hires in their first 90 days must work on-site at least four days per week.

question: 請整理理賠作業指引中的給付時程章節。

gold_span_refs.quote: 文件齊備後，標準案件於七個工作天內完成審核。
若涉及醫療調閱，審核時程可能延長至十五個工作天。

question: Summarize the onboarding support section in Benefits Overview, including the Chinese security requirement.

gold_span_refs.quote: New hires receive a mentor for the first 30 days.
新進同仁需在到職後七天內完成資訊安全課程。

question: 請整理 travel policy 的 reimbursement 部分。

gold_span_refs.quote: Meal receipts must be submitted within 30 days.
Hotel receipts must be submitted within 45 days.

question: Summarize the common onboarding requirements across the employee handbook and Benefits Overview.

gold_span_refs.quote: All employees must finish security training within 14 days of onboarding.
New hires receive a mentor for the first 30 days.
新進同仁需在到職後七天內完成資訊安全課程。

question: 請整理 employee handbook 與 Benefits Overview 關於請假與彈性工作的共同主題。

gold_span_refs.quote: Employees receive 15 days of annual leave after probation.
Regular employees may work remotely up to three days per week.
Full-time employees receive 12 days of annual leave in the first year.
The hybrid work arrangement allows up to two remote days per week.
